## once() function

Make a function executable only once, following calls are ignored

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function once<T extends (...args: any[]) => any>(fn: T): T;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  fn | T |  |

<b>Returns:</b>

T

fn, wrapped to run only upon first execution
